name: Crillo De Pollo
recipeIngredient: 3 large Russet potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spread half of the onions in a large, deep baking dish. Place chicken on top. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle garlic, thyme, and bay leaves over chicken. Spread remaining onions on top; drizzle with 1 cup stock.
3. Roast uncovered for 30 minutes, or until chicken turns golden around the edges.
4. Remove chicken and place it in a 6-quart soup pot. Deglaze the roasting pan with some water or stock and add to the pot. Add the remaining stock and potatoes.
5. Simmer for 15 minutes. Add carrots and corn. Simmer for another 25 minutes.
6. Using a wide fork, roughly mash at least 4 of the potato chunks to help thicken the soup.
7. Beat egg yolk into the cream, then beat in half cup of stock from the soup pot. Blend in arrowroot if desired for a thicker soup.
8. Pour the cream mixture back into the soup, stirring until well-blended.
9. Just before serving, add minced parsley and cilantro. Ladle into wide, deep soup bowls. Ensure each bowl has a chunk of potato, a piece of chicken, a couple of carrots, and a piece of corn.
10. Serves 6.
PER SERVING (skin removed): 445 calories, 31 g protein, 52 g carbohydrate, 14 g fat (6 g saturated), 123 mg cholesterol, 463 mg sodium, 7 g fiber.
